mission.objective: Audit the home surface for canon violations: asset misattribution (BR-specific scene on home), lockup misuse (collection lockup as homepage centerpiece), wrong tile content (brand logos + jersey patch instead of collection scenes), copy attribution.
mission.founder_feedback: the hero shouldnt be the same image as the collection, why is the jersey patched displayed. each collection card should be a image of the scene i want.
mission.success_metric: Every violation cited with file:line + canon-doc quote. Per-tile asset attribution table produced. Kids patch question resolved with verdict.

scope._scope_policy: FULL-SITE coverage. Brand Guardian audits canon across every surface — header monogram placement, mega-menu copy tone, hero lockup attribution, body component voice consistency, footer founder signature, every widget's brand-mark use. Narrow focus = canon drift in surfaces nobody is watching.
scope.scope_note: primary_focus_surfaces lists what the current fix sprint targets. Even so, Brand Guardian reviews the full site map for canon ripples — collection lockup misuse on PDP, founder voice drift on About, palette inconsistencies across cart/checkout, etc.

deliverables.name: Canon audit (home surface)
sections: Violations (CV-H-NN: ID / Severity P0-P2 / File:line / Current state / Canon source verbatim / Required state / Rationale)

roi_upgrade.mandate: Propose exactly 1 high-ROI canon-signature touch per the Upgrade Mandate.
category_options: Rose-gold accent pulse on hover/focus for --sr-accent elements (1.5s ease loop, 0.4→1.0 opacity)
Monogram emergence pattern on initial load (clip-path reveal, 800ms)
Signature copy beat — staggered line entrance with letter-spacing animation
Brand-mark micro-interaction on navbar (rotate + scale on hover, GPU-accelerated)
Per-collection palette inheritance via data-collection attribute + CSS custom property cascade
Color-mix() palette derivation — tints/shades from --sr-accent at runtime
Cinzel-to-Playfair font crossfade between cover and hero sections (collection-coded)

violation_candidates: forbidden-midnight used on home cover (BR-specific asset per asset-hierarchy.md)
forbidden-midnight reused on home hero (duplicate w/ cover)
br-brand-script lockup on home hero (collection lockup not brand-primary)
Spread tile 4 uses skyy-rose-collection-circular-patch (jersey patch / brand mark, not collection scene)

memory.write_mandate: Write at least 1 memory entry per dispatch when canon doc evolves, founder locks a new attribution rule (e.g., 'forbidden-midnight is BR-only'), OR a violation pattern recurs across audits. Cite the canon doc + verbatim quote in body.
